title: lamium moschatum var. ochroleucum
intro: Lamium moschatum var. ochroleucum is a variety of the spotted dead nettle plant, a flowering perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of China. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The health benefits of Lamium moschatum var. ochroleucum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and act as an antipyretic to lower body temperature. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations such as tea, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
